purpose: Declare which systems consume dashboard snapshots and architecture contracts from proving-project dashboards.

contract.rule: Producer projects own runtime truth. Consumer projects roll up state and must not fake missing producer telemetry.

producers.label: Khashi VC ROC
openRolloutWork: Confirm production auth and endpoint freshness from the standard production map.
Migrate visible static shell to package-native dashboard-kit components.

producers.label: Media Engine Ops
openRolloutWork: Confirm Media Business Operations production uses snapshot feed alongside existing direct file reads.
Migrate visible static shell to package-native dashboard-kit components.

consumers.label: Media Business Operations
consumers.purpose: Roll Media Engine production, publishing, cost, channel, and human-video state into the media operating-company dashboard.

consumers.label: Hermes OS
consumers.purpose: Central runtime command surface for deployed project health, logs, dashboard discovery, and production inspection.

consumers.label: TLC Capital Group OS
consumers.purpose: Enterprise readiness, investment/media business rollups, executive blockers, and cross-project production status.
